content.stem: Which one belongs to a different category: triangle, square, circle, red? Explain why your choice is different from the others.
content.explanation: Triangle, square, and circle are all shapes, while red is a color. Red does not belong with the group of shapes.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students may focus on incomplete pattern recognition, seeing triangle as different because they partially recognize the shape category but get distracted by the angles versus curves distinction
Students may think square is different because it has the most corners
Students may think circle is different because it has no straight sides
